# Gerador de Certificados Pro

## Overview
Full-stack application for automated PDF certificate generation from Excel files. Built with React 19, Node.js (Express), and Puppeteer. Features a real-time template editor, custom design system, QR code tracking, and ZIP batch processing.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: React 19, Vite 8, React Router DOM 7, Lucide-React, Axios.
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, Puppeteer (PDF rendering), ExcelJS, Archiver, better-sqlite3.
- **Styling**: CSS3 Vanilla (Custom Properties), HSL colors.
- **Deploy**: Docker (Multi-stage), Easypanel ready.

## Key Features
- **Smart Excel Import**: Supports Name, CPF, Course, Date, and Workload mapping.
- **Advanced Typography**: Playfair Display, Inter, and Arial fonts with font-weight control (300-800).
- **Rich Text Editor**: Integrated tool for formatted course content on the back of the certificate.
- **Export/Import Config**: JSON-based template state management for consistency across sessions.
- **Live Preview**: Real-time rendering of changes using CSS variables and Puppeteer-ready HTML.
- **Authentication**: Unique QR Code and alphanumeric validation via SQLite database.

## Key Components
- `FileUpload.jsx`: Excel upload and validation.
- `DataPreview.jsx`: List and filter imported records.
- `TemplateEditor.jsx`: UI for certificate styling (colors, fonts, weights, assets).
- `RichTextEditor.jsx`: HTML editor for backing content.
- `GenerationProgress.jsx`: Async generation with progress tracking.
- `DownloadPanel.jsx`: Logic for batch and individual PDF downloads.

## API Endpoints
- `POST /api/upload`: Excel processing.
- `POST /api/upload/assets`: Image management.
- `POST /api/certificates/preview`: Real-time HTML preview.
- `POST /api/certificates/generate`: Bulk generation (PDF + ZIP).
- `GET /api/validate/:code`: Alphanumeric code authentication.
- `GET /api/health`: Container health check.

## Scripts
- `install.bat`: Full dependency install.
- `start.bat`: Parallel dev server boot.

## Design System
- **Colors**: Deep Navy (#0a0e1a), Gold (#e8a838), Midnight (#1a1a2e).
- **Typography**: Playfair Display (Titles), Inter (Body), Arial (Alternative).
- **UI**: Glassmorphism effects, pulse animations, responsive sidebars.
